metadata.description: Vulnerability prioritization tool that filters out noise

banner.underDevelopment: TPT is under active development. Things can break suddenly! 🚧

home.title: Vulnerability prioritization that makes sense
home.description1: Titt På Ting is a prioritization tool meant to filter out noise and uncertainty.
home.description2: Not all vulnerabilities are created equal and we've done the work for you to analyze and rank the most critical vulnerabilities in the teams you belong to. The vulnerability list is fetched from the Nais API.

summary.priorityWarning: Prioritization is based on available information. A vulnerability can be critical even if it's prioritized low, for example if it hasn't been analyzed yet.

sync.fetchingInBackground: Updating vulnerability data in the background...

github.pageDescription: This page shows vulnerabilities detected by GitHub in your repositories. GitHub analyzes your dependencies for known security issues and reports them here. The data is fetched from GitHub's dependency scanning.

repository.showingTop: Showing top {count} repositories by risk score

list.noVulnerabilitiesSpecific: 🙌 We see no {name} vulnerabilities you need to fix. 🙌
list.rebuildBaseImageDescription: These vulnerabilities are in OS packages and are fixed by rebuilding the container image with an updated base image.
list.updateDependenciesDescription: These vulnerabilities are in application dependencies and are fixed by updating the package versions.
list.osPackageSummary: {vulnCount} {vulnCount, plural, one {vulnerability} other {vulnerabilities}} in {pkgCount} {pkgCount, plural, one {OS package} other {OS packages}}
list.appPackageSummary: {vulnCount} {vulnCount, plural, one {vulnerability} other {vulnerabilities}} in {pkgCount} {pkgCount, plural, one {package} other {packages}}
list.fixableByRebuild: {count} {count, plural, one {vulnerability fixed} other {vulnerabilities fixed}} by rebuilding base image

teamFilter.title: Filter
teamFilter.description: Select which teams you want to see data for. Only selected teams will be shown.
teamFilter.appsDescription: Select which applications you want to see data for. Empty means all.
teamFilter.showAllBucketsDescription: By default, only the three highest priority buckets are shown to reduce noise.

vulnerabilitiesPage.title: Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilitiesPage.description: The table is based on all applications that have generated an SBOM for nais console, and are in a namespace you belong to.

workload.explanationTitle: Explanation of terms and risk scoring
workload.riskScoreDescription: The risk score (0–100) is calculated as the sum of five categories: severity, exploitation evidence, exposure, environment context, and actionability. Higher value means it's more urgent.

vulnerabilityDetail.descriptionShowMore: See the rest of the description...
vulnerabilityDetail.noRiskFactors: No risk factors are identified for this vulnerability.

filter.showingLimited: Showing {showing} of {total}. Search to narrow down.

leaderView.title: Team Overview
leaderView.description: An overview of all teams and their vulnerabilities.
leaderView.noCriticalDescription: No teams have high priority vulnerabilities at the moment.

teamMemberView.title: Security Status
teamMemberView.description: Overview of security status for your teams.
teamMemberView.basedOnRequirement: Targets are based on compliance requirement
teamMemberView.noCriticalOverdue: 🙌 No critical vulnerabilities requiring immediate action!
teamMemberView.noCriticalOverdueDescription: All critical vulnerabilities are under control.
teamMemberView.allDeploymentsUpToDate: 🚀 All deployments are up to date!
teamMemberView.allDeploymentsUpToDateDescription: All applications are deployed according to target.

noTeamView.title: No teams found
noTeamView.description: We were unable to link you to any development teams.
noTeamView.message: It appears you are not a member of any teams in our system. Please contact the appsec team if you believe this is an error.

admin.title: Administration
admin.vulnerabilitySearchDescription: Search by CVE ID or package name to find all affected workloads

teamView.title: Vulnerabilities for {teamSlug}
teamView.description: Admin view – data is fetched directly from the NAIS API for this team.

admin.ssvcBackfillConfirmation: This re-fetches every tracked CVE from NVD to backfill missing SSVC data. The job runs in the background and may take a while. Continue?
admin.ssvcBackfillStarted: SSVC backfill started. Check application logs for progress.
admin.gcveCvssDiscrepancies: CVSS discrepancies between NVD and GCVE ({count})
admin.gcveNoDifferences: No differences found between NVD and GCVE.

welcome.heading: Which of these sounds most like you?
welcome.subheading: Pick the role you relate to most and we'll shape your dashboard around what matters in your day. You can change this anytime in settings.
welcome.changeAnytime: You can switch roles anytime from settings.

DEVELOPER.title: Developer
DEVELOPER.subtitle: Technical view
DEVELOPER.description: I'm responsible for patching and fixing vulnerabilities in our products.

TEAM_MEMBER.title: Team Member
TEAM_MEMBER.subtitle: Non-technical view
TEAM_MEMBER.description: I work in a team and need an overview of our security situation.

PRODUCT_LEADER.title: Product Leader
PRODUCT_LEADER.subtitle: Non-technical view
PRODUCT_LEADER.description: I lead a product area and need a high-level view to delegate and prioritize work.

TECH_LEADER.title: Tech Leader
TECH_LEADER.subtitle: Non-technical view
TECH_LEADER.description: I'm responsible for the overall security posture across the organization or my department.

errors.title: An error occurred
errors.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Please try again later.
errors.fetchTeamsSlaError: Could not fetch teams SLA data
errors.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized. Please log in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this resource.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.clientError: There was a problem with your request.
errors.internalServerError: The server encountered an error. Please try again later.
errors.badGateway: The backend service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.gatewayTimeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
errors.serverError: A server error occurred. Our team has been notified.
errors.shouldReport: If this problem persists, please report it with the trace ID below.
